layout.spacing_system: Dense control room grid. p-4 to p-6 inside cards. gap-4 or gap-6 between widgets.
layout.surface_strategy: Flat solid surfaces with 1px border. No drop shadows for dashboard cards to maintain pristine data clarity. Modals/Dialogs use shadow-xl.
layout.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white h-screen fixed top-0 left-0 flex flex-col

components.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-slate-900 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-slate-800 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:ring-offset-2
components.button_secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-slate-900 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50 focus:outline-none
components.input: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-transparent
components.kanban_column: bg-slate-100/50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-200 flex flex-col gap-3 h-full
components.kanban_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-4 shadow-sm cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:border-slate-300 transition-colors
components.heatmap_cell: rounded-sm transition-colors duration-200 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold
components.voice_mic_fab: fixed bottom-8 right-8 h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-slate-900 text-white shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-105 transition-transform backdrop-blur-xl border border-slate-700/50 z-50
components.badge: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold

login_bg.description: Modern school building exterior at twilight with glowing windows.
login_bg.usage: Background for the Director/Teacher login screen. CRITICAL: Add absolute inset-0 bg-slate-900/80 overlay over this image so the white login card stands out.

teacher_avatar_female.description: Professional female teacher standing by a chalkboard.
teacher_avatar_female.usage: Avatar for female teachers in staff list, schedule, and kanban cards.

teacher_avatar_male.description: Professional male teacher with glasses smiling.
teacher_avatar_male.usage: Avatar for male teachers in staff list, schedule, and kanban cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use Russian language for all UI elements (e.g., 'Дашборд', 'Инциденты', 'Расписание', 'Столовая', 'Приказы RAG').
Use Manrope font for all text. It supports Cyrillic natively and looks highly authoritative yet modern.
Implement the layout with a sticky left sidebar and a scrollable main content area (margin-left applied to main wrapper to accommodate the fixed sidebar).
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide-react for sharp, professional iconography.
The Heatmap must be dense. Map teaching load values (0-6 hours per day) to color intensities: 0 = bg-slate-100, 1-2 = bg-amber-100, 3-4 = bg-amber-300, 5 = bg-orange-500, 6+ = bg-red-600.
Voice-to-Task must be a fixed FAB (Floating Action Button) in the bottom right corner with a glassmorphism or elevated shadow effect.
AI Substitution ('Учитель заболел') action should trigger a modal dialog displaying a skeleton loader for ~1-2 seconds, then revealing the AI-recommended substitute teacher.

Do not use generic purple/cyan gradients. Rely entirely on high-contrast Swiss aesthetics: strong slate-900 blacks, crisp whites, flat borders, and meaningful accent colors (red/amber) to maintain a premium SaaS feel suitable for a Director.
Ensure the RAG orders view features a side-by-side or clearly delineated layout: Original text vs AI Simplified text.
Ensure all interactive components (buttons, links, inputs) have 'data-testid' attributes as defined in the testing conventions.
